'''Pule''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] who worked in the customs office of [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]], the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. She was to inspect [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], but he bribed her with two ten-[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] coins.

{{Char-stub}}
